hero.title: Meet Our Gurus
hero.subtitle: Learn from master teachers
hero.description: Discover our team of expert scholars and practitioners who guide your journey through ancient wisdom.

gurus.name: Swami Ananda
gurus.title: Senior Sanskrit Scholar
gurus.bio: A renowned Sanskrit scholar with over 30 years of teaching experience. Swami Ananda has dedicated his life to preserving and transmitting ancient wisdom.

gurus.name: Dr. Rajesh Kumar
gurus.title: Professor of Indian Philosophy
gurus.bio: Professor Kumar is a leading authority on Indian philosophy with extensive research in classical texts and modern applications.

testimonials.title: What Students Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from our learning community

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.content: Swami Ananda's teaching style is incredible. He makes complex Sanskrit concepts so accessible and engaging.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.content: Dr. Kumar's philosophy courses have completely transformed my understanding of Indian thought. Highly recommended!

join.title: Join Our Teaching Team
join.subtitle: Share your knowledge with the world
join.description: Are you an expert in Sanskrit, Indian philosophy, or related fields? We're always looking for passionate teachers to join our mission.
requirements: Deep knowledge in Sanskrit or Indian philosophy
